Instruction: When plant is knee-high broadcast between rows
Beans fix their own Nitrogen. Do NOT apply CAN — it will reduce yield.
Apply when plants are 15–20cm tall, before earthing up
Split into 3 applications. Add foliar potassium at fruiting stage.
Kale is a heavy feeder. Regular top dressing is critical for continuous harvest.
Apply at tillering for maximum tiller development
One application at vegetative stage is sufficient
